top_signals.title: Zambia Creditor Group Pushes Back on $1.36 Billion Bond Buyback
top_signals.summary: A group of holders of a Zambian $1.36 billion bond due 2053 is opposing a tender offer launched by the government, saying it was conducted without negotiation and would harm investors’ interests.

top_signals.title: Private equity-backed Ryan triumphs in bidding for European tax adviser Svalner Atlas
top_signals.summary: Private equity-based US accountancy firm Ryan has reportedly agreed to acquire European tax adviser Svalner Atlas Advisors in a deal reportedly worth $400m. The transaction, which may be announced as early as this week, follows a competitive process in which Ryan beat rivals at Swedish private equity firm EQT AB for the asset, according to [...]
